method_summary: The paper describes a conceptual framework for integrating generative AI into information access systems, focusing on two paradigms: direct information generation and information synthesis.
key_innovation: Proposing a unified categorization of generative AI's impact on information access into 'information generation' and 'information synthesis' paradigms.
baselines_compared: Traditional information retrieval systems such as search engines and recommendation platforms
limitations_stated: Traditional systems fall short for less common (long-tail) information needs and creative creation scenarios.
title: Foundations of GenIR
